app.title: OmniAgent Workspace
app.subtitle: AI chatbot · leads · appointments
lang.label: Language
empty.conversations: No conversations yet. Embed the widget on your site to start collecting visitors.
empty.leads: No leads captured yet. Leads appear here when visitors share their contact info.
lead.name: Name
embed.title: Embed on your website
embed.help: Paste this snippet just before your closing </body> tag. The chatbot will appear in the bottom-right of every page.
empty.listings: No listings yet. Click + Add Listing to create one. When a new listing matches a customer's saved tracking criteria, an automatic SMS is sent.
listing.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this listing?
listing.required_fields: Street address, city, and state are required.
confirm.title: Confirm appointment
confirm.invalid_time: Please enter a valid start time.
confirm.conflict_title: This time conflicts with existing events:
confirm.calendar_not_connected: Google Calendar is not connected — confirming will save the appointment but no calendar event will be created.
confirm.calendar_error: The appointment was saved, but the calendar event could not be created: {error}
settings.calendar.title: Google Calendar integration
settings.calendar.help: Connect your Google Calendar so that confirmed appointments automatically create events and send invitations to visitors.
settings.calendar.disconnect_prompt: Disconnect Google Calendar? Confirmed appointments will no longer create calendar events.
settings.calendar.not_configured: OAuth credentials are not set on the server. See .env.example to configure GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID / SECRET.
settings.sms.title: SMS Reminders
settings.sms.help: Automatically send an SMS to visitors 3 hours before their confirmed appointment. They can reply YES to confirm or NO to reschedule.
settings.sms.not_configured_hint: Twilio credentials are not set. See .env.example to configure TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID / AUTH_TOKEN / FROM_NUMBER.
